text:
Gladiatorsstar Legend has been revealed how an eating disorder changed the course of his life.

The fitness guru and former triple jumper, 38, was trying to represent Great Britain at the 2012Olympic GamesinLondon, but he found himself struggling with an eating cycle as he chased his dreams.

Nowappearing as a Gladiatoron theBBC’s revival ofthe classic 1990s show, he has since conquered the eating disorder, which saw him trapped in a cycle of starvation and bingeing which hampered his training.

He would starve himself in the buildup to a competition to try and match the size of his rivals, before attempting to make up for it by binge eating.

‘I would put away 10,000 calories a day over those weekends,’ he told theMirrorabout the moments after a competition had finished.

‘Sometimes I felt so full, I could hardly move and would lie on my bed feeling like I was going to vomit.

‘I remember thinking it was weird at the time but I felt powerless to stop it.’

Legend – whose real name is Matt Morsia – has insisted young people in sports need better support to stop others falling into a similarly extreme eating regime.

Writing in his 2020 book The 24/7 Body, he said: ‘There’s a total lack of support for young people in a lot of sports, many of which encourage – if not actively then implicitly some kind of starvation or significant restriction of diet and I certainly fell into this trap.’

His Olympic dreams were ended by a back injury, but he made the jump to powerlifting and earned himself a silver medal at the 2016 European Championships.

Now delighting viewers on Gladiators, he teased that he is head and shoulders above the competition.

‘I’ve been training like a beast for the show but realistically I didn’t need to,’ he quipped. ‘I could’ve spent the last two months eating doughnuts and playing Dungeons & Dragons and I’d still be better than everyone else.

‘I’m called Legend for a reason! I can only apologise for the irreparable damage I’m about to do to the contenders. Actually, that’s a lie, I’m not sorry at all. I’m actively looking forward to it.’

title: Gladiators star battled eating disorder while chasing Olympic dream | Metro News
description: Gladiators star Legend, real name Matt Morsia, reveals eating disorder struggle while chasing Olympic dream years before the BBC revival.
